description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:20.04 Docker image as default and set GIT_STRATEGY to clone and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to none. Add a global before_script that echoes the job name and CI_OPEN_MERGE_REQUESTS, updates apt, installs git gcc make libreadline-dev libbsd-dev readline-common, and runs submodules/get-submodules.sh. Define a single stage called build and a make job in that stage that runs make LUADEBUG=1 && make test, produces artifacts from src/librosie/binaries and build/* that expire after 40 minutes, and runs only on the dev, release, and master branches. Configure the job to retry up to two times on exit code 100 for API, runner system, unknown, and scheduler failures.
